ha2dbf183gef98g4db5g9393g3f26c4d8b438: More survivors? They're trying to dig somebody out of the wreckage.
h25efebd5g34c2g4fa3g8bcfg8375d417d1f4: Something's wrong. They should be trying to get away if they had any sense.
h72cfa726g1139g4ed9gafbfg53fcf6f82431: Move with care - I sense a ghaik's presence.
hbf4e905fg8274g406ag9c70g5cc536a3c744: Why do they look so... unnatural?
ha2a3f151g3043g4906ga3b5g84c3ecd0e21c: I've seen desperation like that before. Someone's playing mind games.
h62064591gfc21g4111gaa64ga6360bc4885c: Take caution! Those aren't mere survivors - they're mind flayer thralls.
h5dfaf2bdg2054g4b41g9cc6gc17e3afbf2f2: Until we know every mind flayer that was aboard is dead, don't trust anything you see.
habfd28cfge457g43c5g85e0g5d08ba9ec742: Something's controlling them. I can feel it - faint, but alive.
had7ec50agad0cg4feagb481g72a0dc9f378f: Not sure, but we better find out.
